tasks.label: saas-api-smoke
tasks.command: cd frappe-bench && ./env/bin/python -c "import frappe; frappe.init(site='erp.local', sites_path='sites'); frappe.connect(); from saas_control.saas_control import api; print(api.resolve_tenant('owner2@example.com')); frappe.destroy()"

tasks.label: saas-cwd-check
tasks.command: cd frappe-bench && pwd && ls logs | head -n 3

tasks.label: saas-resolve-smoke
tasks.command:
cd frappe-bench && ./env/bin/python - <<'PY'
import frappe
frappe.init(site='erp.local', sites_path='sites')
frappe.connect()
from saas_control.saas_control import api
print(api.resolve_tenant('owner2@example.com'))
frappe.destroy()
PY

tasks.label: saas-create-or-login-existing
tasks.command: cd frappe-bench/sites && ../env/bin/python -c "import frappe; frappe.init(site='erp.local', sites_path='.'); frappe.connect(); from saas_control.saas_control import api; print(api.create_or_login(email='owner2@example.com')); frappe.destroy()"

tasks.label: saas-create-or-login-new
tasks.command: cd frappe-bench/sites && ../env/bin/python -c "import frappe; frappe.init(site='erp.local', sites_path='.'); frappe.connect(); from saas_control.saas_control import api; print(api.create_or_login(email='owner5@example.com', full_name='Owner Five', company_slug='tenant5', password='admin')); frappe.destroy()"

tasks.label: saas-registry-check
tasks.command: docker exec erp-mariadb mysql -uroot -proot -e "SELECT owner_email, company_slug, site_name, status FROM _87c647131f7846f5.__saas_tenant_registry ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;"

tasks.label: saas-registry-check-2
tasks.command: docker exec erp-mariadb mysql -uroot -proot -e "SELECT owner_email, company_slug, site_name, status FROM _87c163f594e3ade7.__saas_tenant_registry ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;"

tasks.label: saas-resolve-smoke-after-patch
tasks.command: cd frappe-bench/sites && ../env/bin/python -c "import frappe; frappe.init(site='erp.local', sites_path='.'); frappe.connect(); from saas_control.saas_control import api; print('owner2', api.resolve_tenant('owner2@example.com')); print('owner1', api.resolve_tenant('owner1@example.com')); frappe.destroy()"

tasks.label: saas-registry-check-3
tasks.command: docker exec erp-mariadb mysql -uroot -proot -e "SELECT owner_email, company_slug, site_name, status FROM _87c163f594e3ade7.__saas_tenant_registry ORDER BY id DESC;"

tasks.label: saas-page-smoke
tasks.command: curl -s -o /tmp/saas_page.html -w "%{http_code}" http://erp.local:8000/saas && echo && rg -n "Launch Your ERP Tenant|saas_portal.js" /tmp/saas_page.html

tasks.label: saas-api-resolve-smoke-ui
tasks.command:
cd frappe-bench/sites && ../env/bin/python - <<'PY'
import frappe
frappe.init(site='erp.local', sites_path='.')
frappe.connect()
from saas_control.saas_control.api import resolve_tenant
print(resolve_tenant('owner2@example.com'))
frappe.destroy()
PY

tasks.label: saas-api-resolve-post-web-start
args: cd frappe-bench/sites && ../env/bin/python -c "import frappe, json; frappe.init(site='erp.local'); frappe.connect(); from saas_control.saas_control.api import resolve_tenant; print(json.dumps(resolve_tenant('owner2@example.com'), default=str)); frappe.destroy()"

tasks.label: saas-api-resolve-post-web-start-fixed
args: cd frappe-bench/sites && ../env/bin/python -c "import frappe, json; frappe.init(site=\"erp.local\"); frappe.connect(); from saas_control.saas_control.api import resolve_tenant; print(json.dumps(resolve_tenant(\"owner2@example.com\"), default=str)); frappe.destroy()"

tasks.label: create-nipio-site-alias
args: cd frappe-bench/sites && [ -e crysomedia.127.0.0.1.nip.io ] || ln -s crysomedia.erp.local crysomedia.127.0.0.1.nip.io && ls -la crysomedia.127.0.0.1.nip.io

tasks.label: verify-resolve-redirect-url
args: cd frappe-bench/sites && ../env/bin/python -c "import frappe, json; frappe.init(site='erp.local'); frappe.connect(); from saas_control.saas_control.api import resolve_tenant; print(json.dumps(resolve_tenant('owner2@example.com'), default=str)); frappe.destroy()"

tasks.label: verify-resolve-redirect-url-fixed
args: cd frappe-bench/sites && ../env/bin/python -c "import frappe, json; frappe.init(site=\"erp.local\"); frappe.connect(); from saas_control.saas_control.api import resolve_tenant; print(json.dumps(resolve_tenant(\"owner2@example.com\"), default=str)); frappe.destroy()"

tasks.label: lint-shell-scripts
args: sh -n team_setup.sh && sh -n start_all.sh && sh -n stop_all.sh

args: Add team bootstrap scripts and zero-config startup flow
